scope.target: Minimum viable requirement and spec set for the current Product, Order, and Inventory bounded contexts
constraints: Align docs with the current source tree, not the legacy Scrum/PBI model
Use only repository-verifiable behavior for this first batch of Stage 4 docs
Keep the scope to one overview requirement plus three aggregate/use-case slices
non_goals: Do not attempt full bounded-context coverage in a single stage
Do not generate implementation code from these docs in this task

inputs.architecture_target: Stage 4 should replace empty guidance-only areas with real project-specific requirement/spec truth tied to the current Product, Order, and Inventory contexts.
review_findings: The repository had no real requirement documents beyond guides.
The repository had no real aggregate/use-case specs under .dev/specs/.
user_constraints: Continue the documentation refactor workflow after project-config cleanup.

steps: Create one overview requirement document describing the bounded contexts and MQ-first collaboration.
Create entity specs for Product, Order, and InventoryItem.
Create use-case specs for CreateProduct, PlaceOrder, and DecreaseStock.
validation: Requirement document reflects the current source tree and BC contracts.
Each spec points to a real aggregate and real use case in the codebase.
Stage 4 now contains real project truth instead of guide-only placeholders.
deferred_items: Additional use-case specs such as update product, ship order, and restock inventory.
Detailed runtime operations docs reserved for Stage 5.

results.summary: Added the first real requirement and spec documents aligned with the current Product, Order, and Inventory bounded contexts.
